sentences.target: Im Treppenhaus riecht es nach frischer Farbe.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈtʁɛpənhaʊ̯s ʁiːçt ɛs naːx ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈfaʁbə/

translations.de: Im Treppenhaus riecht es nach frischer Farbe.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈtʁɛpənhaʊ̯s ʁiːçt ɛs naːx ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈfaʁbə/
translations.en: It smells like fresh paint in the stairwell.
translations.es: En la escalera huele a pintura fresca.
translations.fr: Ça sent la peinture fraîche dans la cage d'escalier.
translations.it: Nel vano scale si sente odore di vernice fresca.
translations.zh-Hans: 楼道里有一股新刷油漆的味道。
translations.pt: Na escada do prédio cheira a tinta fresca.
translations.he: יש ריח של צבע טרי בחדר המדרגות.
translations.tr: Merdiven boşluğunda taze boya kokusu var.
translations.vi: Trong cầu thang có mùi sơn mới.
translations.ar: تفوح רائحة طلاء جديد في درج المبنى.
translations.nl: In het trappenhuis ruikt het naar verse verf.
translations.hi: सीढ़ियों में ताज़ा पेंट की गंध आ रही है.
translations.pl: Na klatce schodowej czuć świeżą farbę.
translations.nb: Det lukter fersk maling i oppgangen.
translations.id: Di tangga tercium bau cat baru.
translations.ro: În casa scărilor miroase a vopsea proaspătă.
translations.cs: Na schodišti je cítit čerstvá barva.
translations.da: Det lugter af frisk maling i opgangen.
translations.ja: 階段に新しいペンキのにおいがする。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase in the dative.
Head noun of the PP 'Im Treppenhaus', functioning as a locative adverbial.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present); forms an impersonal construction with expletive 'es' and selects 'nach' for the odor source.
Expletive pronoun serving as a syntactic subject placeholder in the impersonal construction.
Preposition required by 'riechen' to introduce what something smells of; governs the dative.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Farbe', inflected to agree (feminine dative singular).
Noun complement of the preposition 'nach' (object of the PP).

sentences.target: Das Licht im Treppenhaus ist schon wieder kaputt.
sentences.reading: /das lɪçt ɪm ˈtʁɛpənhaʊ̯s ɪst ʃoːn ˈviːdɐ kaˈpʊt/

translations.de: Das Licht im Treppenhaus ist schon wieder kaputt.
translations.ipa: /das lɪçt ɪm ˈtʁɛpənhaʊ̯s ɪst ʃoːn ˈviːdɐ kaˈpʊt/
translations.en: The light in the stairwell is broken again.
translations.es: La luz de la escalera está otra vez estropeada.
translations.fr: La lumière de la cage d'escalier est encore en panne.
translations.it: La luce nel vano scale è di nuovo rotta.
translations.ru: Свет в подъезде опять не работает.
translations.pt: A luz da escada do prédio estragou-se de novo.
translations.vi: Đèn ở cầu thang lại hỏng rồi.
translations.ar: الضوء في درج المبنى تعطل مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: Het licht in het trappenhuis is weer kapot.
translations.uk: Світло в під'їзді знову не працює.
translations.hu: A lépcsőházban megint nem ég a lámpa.
translations.hi: सीढ़ियों की लाइट फिर से खराब हो गई है.
translations.pl: Światło na klatce schodowej znowu nie działa.
translations.el: Το φως στο κλιμακοστάσιο χάλασε πάλι.
translations.nb: Lyset i oppgangen er ødelagt igjen.
translations.sv: Lampan i trapphuset är trasig igen.
translations.ro: Lumina de pe casa scărilor s-a stricat din nou.
translations.cs: Světlo na schodišti je zase rozbité.
translations.da: Lyset i opgangen er gået i stykker igen.
translations.ja: 階段の電気がまたつかない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking 'Licht' as the nominative singular subject.
Subject noun of the clause.
Contraction of 'in dem'; introduces a PP modifying 'Licht' (location).
Head noun of the PP 'im Treppenhaus'.
Finite copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Adverb modifying 'wieder'; part of the set phrase 'schon wieder' indicating repeated occurrence.
Adverb meaning 'again', indicating repetition.
Predicative adjective expressing state; complement to 'ist'.

sentences.target: Ich warte im Treppenhaus auf den Lieferdienst.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ɪm ˈtʁɛpənhaʊ̯s aʊ̯f deːn ˈliːfɐdiːnst/

translations.de: Ich warte im Treppenhaus auf den Lieferdienst.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ɪm ˈtʁɛpənhaʊ̯s aʊ̯f deːn ˈliːfɐdiːnst/
translations.en: I'm waiting in the stairwell for the delivery service.
translations.es: Estoy esperando al repartidor en la escalera.
translations.fr: J'attends le livreur dans la cage d'escalier.
translations.it: Aspetto il corriere nel vano scale.
translations.pt: Estou à espera do entregador na escada do prédio.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi người giao hàng ở cầu thang.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر عامل التوصيل في درج المبنى.
translations.nl: Ik wacht in het trappenhuis op de bezorger.
translations.hi: मैं सीढ़ियों में डिलीवरी वाले का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam na kuriera na klatce schodowej.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på budet i oppgangen.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på budet i trapphuset.
translations.da: Jeg venter på buddet i opgangen.
translations.ja: 階段で配達員を待っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun serving as the subject (1st person singular).
Finite main verb (1st person singular present); subcategorizes for 'auf' + accusative ('warten auf' = wait for).
Contraction of 'in dem'; introduces a locative PP.
Head noun of the locative PP 'im Treppenhaus'.
Preposition selected by 'warten' to mark its prepositional object; here governs the accusative.
Definite article (accusative singular masculine) determining 'Lieferdienst'.
Noun complement of 'auf' (object of the PP).

sentences.target: Das Treppenhaus ist heute sehr kalt.

translations.de: Das Treppenhaus ist heute sehr kalt.
translations.en: The stairwell is very cold today.
translations.es: Hoy hace mucho frío en la escalera.
translations.fr: La cage d'escalier est très froide aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi nel vano scale fa molto freddo.
translations.pt: Hoje está muito frio na escada do prédio.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cầu thang rất lạnh.
translations.nl: Het is vandaag erg koud in het trappenhuis.
translations.hu: Ma nagyon hideg van a lépcsőházban.
translations.hi: आज सीढ़ियों में बहुत ठंड है.
translations.pl: Dziś na klatce schodowej jest bardzo zimno.
translations.el: Σήμερα στο κλιμακοστάσιο κάνει πολύ κρύο.
translations.nb: Det er veldig kaldt i oppgangen i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini di tangga sangat dingin.
translations.sv: Det är väldigt kallt i trapphuset i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi este foarte frig în casa scărilor.
translations.cs: Dnes je na schodišti hodně zima.
translations.da: I dag er der meget koldt i opgangen.
translations.ja: 今日は階段がとても寒い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking 'Treppenhaus' as the nominative singular subject.
Subject noun of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate.
Temporal adverb setting the time frame.
Degree adverb intensifying 'kalt'.
Predicative adjective serving as the complement of 'ist'.
